metaData.Ingredients:

Allergen Advice: Contains Dairy, Eggs, Gluten, Milk, Soy, Peanut, Tree Nuts
metaData.Key Information: Indulge in the rich, authentic taste of Musang King durian layered between delicate crepes. Perfect for afternoon tea, gatherings, and celebrations, this 6-inch, 400g cake brings a unique flavor experience. Enjoy the smooth, creamy texture combined with the distinctive aroma of premium durian, expertly crafted for durian enthusiasts.
metaData.Preparation:
Storage Instructions:
- Keep frozen at -18^C
- Thaw in the refrigerator for 12 hours; consume promptly after thawing

Serving Suggestions:
- Perfect for afternoon tea, gatherings, and celebrations
- Pairs well with coffee or tea

metaData.Key Information: With 12 years of experience, Dumpling Zhang currently supplies to over 200 restaurants and counting. Handmade pancake with scallion<<<
metaData.Preparation:
1. Add a few teaspoons of cooking oil in a frying pan and put the frozen pancake into the pan without thawing.
2. Medium heat the oil and then change to low heat to fry the pancake until one side turns to golden brown color. Turn to fry the other side of the pancake until it turns to golden-brown color as well.
3. Avoid frying till it get burnt
metaData.SAP Product Name: Dumplings Zhang Handmade Scallion Crispy Pancake

metaData.Key Information:
Made with 100% real watermelon, this juice is like summer in a bottle - fresh, fruity, and super refreshing.
We cold-press the watermelon, which means we squeeze the juice out gently without heat to keep most of the good stuff in — like nutrients, flavour, colour and freshness.

Then we freeze it right away. This helps keep the juice tasting fresh and good for longer - with no need for preservatives. Simply thaw Frozt's Cold-Pressed Juice and enjoy like it was pressed yesterday!
metaData.SAP Product Name: Frozt Frozen Cold-Pressed Juice - Watermelon
metaData.Storage Information: Frozen

product.name: Frozt Frozen Cold-Pressed Juice - Watermelon

metaData.Key Information:
Made with 100% real pineapple, this juice is like a tropical breeze in a bottle — zesty, tangy, and refreshingly bold.

We cold-press the pineapple, which means we squeeze the juice out gently without heat to keep most of the good stuff in — like nutrients, flavour, colour and freshness.

Then we freeze it right away. This helps keep the juice tasting fresh and good for longer - with no need for preservatives. Simply thaw Frozt's Cold-Pressed Juice and enjoy like it was pressed yesterday!
